latin: Martinus Lutherus ad portam ecclesiae Wittenbergensis accessit. malleum et clavos tenebat. nonaginta quinque theses contra indulgentias in lignum affixit. sonus mallei per totam Europam resonavit.

questions.prompt: Where did Luther nail his theses?
questions.target: On the church door at Wittenberg
choices: On the church door at Wittenberg

translation: Martin Luther approached the door of the church at Wittenberg. He held a hammer and nails. He nailed ninety-five theses against indulgences into the wood. The sound of the hammer echoed throughout all of Europe.
